name: Isaivani
description:
'''Isaivani''' ([[Tamil language|Tamil]]: இசைவாணி; born 16 April 1996) is a [[gaana]] singer who performs with [[The Casteless Collective]] based in [[Chennai]], the [[List of state and union territory capitals in India|capital]] of [[Tamil Nadu]], India. 

In 2020 she was recognised for her achievements with one of the [[100 Women (BBC)|BBC 100 Women]] Awards.
